author: ivan
message: fix(openclaw): Bump OpenClaw version to 2026.4.27 and implement temporary workaround to clear WhatsApp channel config for startup errors. This change addresses potential gateway startup issues due to incomplete WhatsApp config validation.

author: ivan
message: feat(openclaw):Enhance OpenClaw runtime settings and clean up deprecated identity fields. Updated gateway connection status to include last error message during reconnection attempts. Removed identity handling from agent entries as OpenClaw 4.26+ no longer supports it via RPC, ensuring cleaner configuration management.
